meaning: n.(字球式)电动打字机[原商标名]
examples: My mother playing the piano, my dad's prehistoric Selectric.
But an email is not a letter, and you're not typing at an IBM Selectric II typewriter.
Silence, then the Sunday sounds of our house by the lake. My mother playing the piano, my dad's prehistoric Selectric.
One of his first successes: IBM's Model B electric typewriter (a precursor to the Selectric).
Any dimwit (but not Dan Rather) knows the font did not exist on vintage IBM Selectric typewriters.
